2159990.name: Code Alkonost Demo
2159990.description:
Code Alkonost is a first-person, atmospheric adventure where Slavic legends come to life. Travel through a dark fantasy world and encounter the possessive spirits of the underworld. Experience authentic art style and stories never before seen in adventure games.

Story

Welcome to Dark Fantasy World

Two twin sisters Vera and Milena set out to leave gifts in front of the idol of the Slavic god Perun, believing in gods would give them health and peace in the Jawia world. While Vera is handing over food to the idol, Sister Milena decides to become playful and hides from Vera, which leads Vera to the entrance to the Forbidden, a place where robbers are sent when they receive the death penalty, where it was believed that demons wander. After arriving at the Forbidden Forest, she hears her sister screaming, after which she decides to enter the forest, the entrance to the forest is closed and there is no way out for Vera, the sunset has set. Enter the dark fairy tale…

Sanity effect

The sanity effect can impact the game's overall audiovisual experience by adding tension and fear inside the game environment. It's a patented gameplay feature that will make you think outside the box. By using external equipment for your PC, you can potentially enhance your gaming experience through voice-related features.

Travel from Jawia to Nawia

The plot of the game is heavily influenced by dark fantasy literature and comics, as well as Slavic mythology and culture. Players have the opportunity to traverse both the mortal realm and the underworld of Slavic mythology, encountering legendary beasts, fulfilling divine quests, and unraveling enigmas. The game boasts dynamic and immersive environments that enable players to master the use of the Lada star in fending off adversaries. Through solving puzzles and interacting with characters, players can progress to higher levels.

You can't fight back

The game protagonist has no weapons or way to fight back. Instead, she needs to run and hide from creatures. The creatures will have several different personalities, so it is up to the player to decide how to deal with them to further progress through the game world. Are they friends or foes?

Atmospheric environments

The unique visual art style and scanned objects form an ethnographic museum and famous locations never seen in any game before. Scanned face models and voiceovers of real word actors that will provide a breathtaking cinematic experience developed using novel state-of-the-art technologies. Professional performers will provide voice-overs for video game creatures and create the feeling that someone is watching you.

The psychological story of maturity and progression

The story follows a young girl named Vera, who embarks on a journey of self-discovery and uncovers her special abilities and purpose in life. Along the way, she confronts the challenges of growing up and learns to assert her independence, resisting the sinister forces that threaten to possess her body and soul.

Authentic music

The game soundtrack consists of ethno and traditional folklore music but with a different arrangement. Music is accelerated in certain situations to make the player aware of approaching danger. Frightening music and sound effects will create contact tension inside dark forests and abended castles.

We are developing the game with possible integration for VR devices.
2159990.supported_languages:
英语*, 塞尔维亚语, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
